titleStmt.title: SII 27.284: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 284. (A.R. No. 351 of 1930-31.) BANTRA, PUTTUR TALUK, SOUTH CANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the Mahāliṅgēśvara temple.

This record, in characters of about the 9th century A.D., seems to record a political agreement entered into among four persons, viz., Narasiṅgan Durgarāja, son of Balle-oḍeya, Rāchamallan Durgarāja, brother of Viḷarittaḷiyarasa, the Kataṁba ruler whose name is not given and the king N®pamallarāja himself, to the effect that they should discontinue mutual enmity and fights.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmat
rājakulāṁbarādi
tya satyaśauca vinayācāra
sampanna śrī nṛpamallarāja rājya
vṛddhiyuḷḷe sakalaguṇa ga
ṇālaṁkṛta katambhakulōdbhava śrī pṛthuvī rā
jyadoḷ Irvvaru tamuḷēkastarāgi vi
ḷarittaḷiyarasarā priyānujan rācamallandugarāja
balle Oḍeyarā magan narasiṅgandugarāja
nāgi nālvaru yiṟdu sādanūrāmaradaga
ḷadā dēgaladoḷ vōlagada paḷiyava
ruṁ śrīdharapaṭṭaruṁ mēdhāvibhaṭṭaruṁ pureya
kittaruṁ pajjeyaṇaruṁ kukke viśvaruṁ kaṇakaruṁ ma
ntippa ḷu sādanuruḍeyaruṁ jayarāma nā
yagaruṁ kōṭevaḷḷiyaḻtiyaruṁ vayasuri
śrīvikrama voygaruṁ Anebaru perggaḍegaḷu

miḻdu keyoḷ vyavaste Emu
ḍa pageyuṁ paḻiyu mesageyu mu
mundalde Intu salisādonvāraṇāsi
sāśira kavileyu kondapātakanāgi raurava
narakadoḷ tannagōtrasahita puḻu
kōṭi puttu ppōnarakkum Istitiyanniṟisi
donge Aśvamēdhakeyda palamakku
Embōdu viḷarittaḷi yarasargge U
koḍu Embodu valleoḍeyargge
Digital edition of SII 27.284 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
